task_completion.description: Draw a closed quadrilateral with horizontal top and bottom edges.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 4-sided polygon is visible on the canvas. The top and bottom edges appear perfectly horizontal.

task_completion.description: Apply width dimensions of 40 mm to the bottom edge and 70 mm to the top edge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The numbers '40.00' (or '40') and '70.00' (or '70') are visible next to the bottom and top edges of the trapezoid, respectively.

task_completion.description: Apply a vertical height dimension of 25 mm between the top and bottom edges.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '25.00' (or '25') is visible, representing the vertical distance between the top and bottom horizontal edges.

task_completion.description: Ensure the trapezoid is symmetric with equal-length side edges.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left and right side edges appear visually symmetric. Equal length constraints or symmetry constraints may be visible on the side edges.

task_completion.description: The sketch must be fully constrained.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sketch lines are green (indicating fully constrained in SolveSpace) or the text window displays '0 degrees of freedom'.
The filename 'channel_profile.slvs' is visible in the SolveSpace window title bar or in a file save dialog pointing to the Documents/SolveSpace directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SolveSpace GUI to construct the sketch.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace interface with drawing tools being used, rather than terminal commands or text editors.
Multiple screenshots show the progression of drawing lines, adding constraints, and setting dimensions, rather than just the final result appearing instantly.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually write or edit the .slvs file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) are seen editing the .slvs file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/channel_profile.slvs. The sketch must have a bottom width of 40.0, a top width of 70.0, and a height of 25.0.
